mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 3-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals deteriorating labor demand and impending recession risk, triggering risk-off equity repricing and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in revolving consumer credit and elevated consumer price levels compress real disposable income while forcing a stagflationary discount rate premium, driving negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur when RSAFS declines and CPIAUCSL remains above 300 simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production sustaining above the 102 index level in a supply-constrained environment signals firm pricing power and margin expansion, boosting short-term equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative forward returns persist when INDPRO exceeds 102 for three consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly housing starts above 1.4 million units reflect durable consumer demand and construction sector health, providing a leading indicator for corporate earnings growth that drives positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over any 2-year rolling window despite housing starts exceeding 1.4 million units.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with elevated price levels compress real disposable income and corporate margins, leading to negative equity returns over the quarter when both thresholds are breached.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% and CPIAUCSL exceeds 300 simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strong payroll growth exceeding 150,000 jobs and sub-4% unemployment indicate a tight labor market supporting wage-driven consumption, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative forward returns occur when PAYEMS exceeds 150,000 and UNRATE remains below 4.0% simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth exceeding 2.5% annualized in an expansionary phase signals robust corporate revenue growth, lifting equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Negative forward returns persist during sustained GDP acceleration above 2.5% annualized.
